title: CMHO Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 107 Dental Assistant, ANM and Pharmacist Posts
description: The Office of the Chief Medical and Health Officer, District Durg (Chhattisgarh), has issued the official notification for 2026. To fill the vacancies for 107 Dental Assistant, Nursing Officer, Security Guard, ANM, and Other Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the 08th, 10th Pass, ANM, Any Degree, B.Sc Nursing, Diploma, GNM, 12th, MBA, Ph.D can grab this chance and apply for the CMHO Notification 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education det...
